examples: Enough of fantasy, the workaday world awaited him.
Instead it dawns on a familiar, workaday place, still in need of groceries and sewage disposal.
Her portrayal of an Istanbul where the old clashes with the new is more workaday than evocative.
In his workaday life Parisi runs the Scuola Romana Rorschach, an institute in Rome.
In practice, my jaded senses detected no significant improvement when performing workaday computing tasks.
